title: Walk-in Drive Financial Analyst at Paytm Money Capital India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Financial Analyst at Paytm Money Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Paytm Money Capital India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Kochi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Paytm Money Capital India:
Paytm Money Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Paytm Money Capital India!
